title: Smoky Quick Venezuelan Rice Pilaf
description: A smoky, crunchy, quick-fix Venezuelan dish featuring cooking wine and keto-friendly ingredients. This recipe prepares a flavorful one-pan dish in under 30 minutes.

ingredients.name: Khao Khua rice
ingredients.notes: Fry-grind rice, available in most Asian grocery stores.

ingredients.name: Smoked paprika
ingredients.notes: Available in most spice stores or online.

instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add diced onion and cook for 2-3 minutes or until translucent.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add diced red bell pepper and cook for 2 minutes or until tender.
Add cooking wine and bring to a boil.
Stir in khao khua rice, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the rice is lightly toasted.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 12 minutes at 400°F (200°C).
Fluff the pilaf with a fork and stir in grated Parmesan cheese and chopped cilantro.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste if needed.
